name: Marble Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat together 1/2 cup peanut butter, butter, corn syrup, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Stir in icing sugar until the mixture is smooth.
3. Melt chocolate chips in a measuring cup using the microwave or a small pot on the stove.
4. Stir in 1/2 cup melted peanut butter into the chocolate mixture until slightly separated.
5. Gently fold this mixture back into the peanut butter mixture to create a marble effect.
6. Pour the mixture into a small pie plate or pan and refrigerate until set.
7. Once set, store in the refrigerator and cut into squares.
